_note: ILLUSTRATIVE SAMPLE DATA. Synthetic snapshot seeded from publicly reported FMCG deals, with publication dates normalised to a recent window purely for demonstration. The deployed app uses real-time public RSS feeds; this file only exists so the demo and pipeline tests work when outbound news access is blocked.
title: Mars to acquire Kellanova in $36 billion deal
summary: Confectionery group Mars has agreed to acquire snacks and cereal maker Kellanova, owner of Pringles and Cheez-It, in a deal valued at about $36 billion, creating one of the world's largest packaged-food companies.

title: Mars strikes $36bn deal to buy Pringles maker Kellanova
summary: Mars has agreed to buy Kellanova, the owner of Pringles and Cheez-It, for around $36 billion, in one of the largest packaged-food acquisitions in years as consumer giants consolidate.

title: Kellanova agrees to $36 billion takeover by Mars
summary: Snacks and cereal maker Kellanova, owner of Pringles and Cheez-It, has agreed to a takeover by Mars valued at about $36 billion, the companies said, in a major consolidation of the packaged-food industry.

title: PepsiCo to acquire prebiotic soda brand poppi for $1.95 billion
summary: PepsiCo has agreed to acquire fast-growing prebiotic soda brand poppi for about $1.95 billion, expanding its push into functional and better-for-you beverages as consumers cut back on traditional soft drinks.

title: PepsiCo buys functional soda maker poppi in nearly $2bn deal
summary: PepsiCo has agreed to buy prebiotic soda brand poppi for roughly $1.95 billion, deepening its bet on functional beverages and better-for-you drinks as soda consumption shifts.

title: Unilever sets out plans to spin off ice cream business in stock-market listing
summary: Unilever has confirmed plans to separate its ice cream division, home to Magnum and Ben & Jerry's, into a standalone listed company, as the consumer goods group sharpens its focus on higher-growth personal care and nutrition brands.

title: Unilever to demerge Magnum ice cream arm via IPO
summary: Unilever will spin off its ice cream business, which includes Magnum and Ben & Jerry's, through a stock-market listing, separating the lower-margin unit as it concentrates on beauty, wellbeing and home care.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper acquires energy drink maker in $1 billion deal
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper has agreed to acquire a fast-growing energy drink brand for about $1 billion, expanding its presence in the booming energy category alongside its coffee and soft-drink portfolio.

title: Mondelez explores potential acquisition of Hershey, sources say
summary: Oreo maker Mondelez International is said to have made a fresh approach to chocolate maker Hershey about a potential combination, according to people familiar with the matter, which would create a confectionery giant. Hershey's controlling trust has previously rebuffed offers.

title: Mondelez said to revive takeover interest in Hershey
summary: Mondelez International has reportedly revived its interest in acquiring chocolate maker Hershey, sources said, in talks that could form a confectionery powerhouse, though Hershey's controlling trust has rejected past approaches.

title: L'Oreal acquires premium skincare brand to expand dermatological beauty
summary: L'Oreal has agreed to acquire a premium skincare brand, adding to its active cosmetics division as the beauty group invests in science-backed dermatological products and premiumisation.

title: Campbell completes $2.7 billion acquisition of premium sauce maker
summary: Campbell has completed its $2.7 billion acquisition of a premium pasta-sauce business, strengthening its branded grocery portfolio with a fast-growing, higher-margin Italian sauce brand.

title: Lactalis to buy regional cheese business, expanding dairy footprint
summary: French dairy group Lactalis has agreed to acquire a regional cheese manufacturer, expanding its production capacity and brand portfolio in a consolidating dairy market.

title: Functional beverage start-up raises $75 million Series C led by consumer fund
summary: A functional beverage start-up has raised $75 million in a Series C funding round led by a consumer-focused growth fund, which it will use to scale distribution and marketing for its better-for-you drinks.

title: Private equity firm takes majority stake in personal care brand
summary: A private equity firm has acquired a majority stake in a fast-growing personal care and hygiene brand, backing its expansion into new categories and international markets.

title: Nestle divests underperforming frozen food unit to focus on coffee and pet care
summary: Nestle has agreed to divest an underperforming frozen food business as the world's largest food company sharpens its portfolio around higher-growth coffee, pet care and nutrition brands.

title: Coca-Cola invests in dairy-alternative brand to broaden drinks portfolio
summary: Coca-Cola has taken a minority investment in a plant-based dairy-alternative brand, broadening its non-carbonated portfolio as demand for plant-based drinks grows.

title: Reckitt agrees to sell homecare brands to private equity buyer
summary: Consumer health and hygiene group Reckitt has agreed to sell a portfolio of homecare brands to a private equity buyer, part of a strategy to streamline its portfolio around higher-margin health and hygiene products.

title: Snack start-up secures $40m investment to expand better-for-you range
summary: A healthy-snack start-up has secured $40 million in growth investment from a consumer venture fund to expand its better-for-you range and accelerate retail distribution across grocery chains.

title: Beauty conglomerate acquires haircare brand to strengthen professional division
summary: A global beauty conglomerate has acquired a fast-growing professional haircare brand, strengthening its salon and professional division amid rising demand for premium hair products.

title: Brewer agrees to acquire craft beer maker in regional consolidation
summary: A major brewer has agreed to acquire a regional craft beer maker, continuing a wave of consolidation in the beer market as larger players buy fast-growing craft and premium brands.

title: Grupo Bimbo to acquire bakery business, expanding in packaged bread
summary: Mexican baking giant Grupo Bimbo has agreed to acquire a regional bakery business, expanding its packaged-bread footprint and distribution network in a key growth market.

title: Pet food maker acquired by consumer goods group in $850 million deal
summary: A premium pet food maker has been acquired by a consumer goods group for about $850 million, as companies chase growth in the resilient and fast-growing pet care category.

title: Oral care challenger brand raises $25m to fund retail expansion
summary: An oral care challenger brand has raised $25 million in a funding round to fund expansion into major grocery and drugstore retailers, taking on established household names.

title: Spirits group acquires premium tequila brand to capture agave boom
summary: A global spirits group has agreed to acquire a premium tequila brand, betting on continued growth in the agave spirits category as consumers trade up to premium tequila and mezcal.

title: Household cleaning brand sold to investment consortium
summary: A well-known household cleaning brand has been sold to an investment consortium, which plans to invest in product innovation and sustainability as it competes with multinational home-care giants.

title: New limited-edition snack flavour launches nationwide this summer
summary: A leading snack brand has launched a new limited-edition flavour available in grocery stores nationwide this summer, supported by a major marketing campaign. The launch is part of the brand's seasonal innovation pipeline.

title: Consumer goods giant posts higher quarterly sales on price increases
summary: A consumer goods giant reported higher quarterly sales and profit, helped by price increases and resilient demand for its household and personal care products, and lifted its full-year outlook for organic growth.

title: Enterprise software firm acquires cloud security start-up for $1.2 billion
summary: An enterprise software firm has agreed to acquire a cloud security start-up for $1.2 billion, expanding its cybersecurity platform and adding tools for threat detection and data protection for corporate IT customers.

title: City football club unveils new home kit for upcoming season
summary: A city football club has unveiled its new home kit for the upcoming season, featuring a redesigned crest and updated colours. The shirt goes on sale to supporters this week ahead of the club's pre-season tour.
